name: cf-optimize

criteria.name: baseline_measured
criteria.description: Performance baseline is measured and recorded before any changes

scoring.0: No baseline measurement taken — optimization is blind
scoring.1: Baseline mentioned qualitatively (e.g., 'it was slow') but no numbers
scoring.2: Baseline measured but methodology is unclear or not reproducible
scoring.3: Clear baseline with specific numbers, methodology, and environment documented

criteria.name: bottleneck_identified
criteria.description: The actual performance bottleneck is identified with evidence

scoring.0: No bottleneck analysis — changes made based on guesswork
scoring.1: Bottleneck suspected but not verified with profiling or measurement
scoring.2: Bottleneck identified with some evidence but analysis could be deeper
scoring.3: Bottleneck precisely identified with profiling data or targeted measurements

criteria.name: improvement_measured
criteria.description: Performance after optimization is measured using the same methodology

scoring.0: No after-measurement — improvement is assumed but not verified
scoring.1: After-measurement exists but uses different methodology than baseline
scoring.2: After-measurement uses same methodology but lacks statistical rigor (single run)
scoring.3: After-measurement uses identical methodology with multiple runs showing consistent improvement

criteria.name: before_after_comparison
criteria.description: Clear comparison showing the magnitude and significance of improvement

scoring.0: No comparison between before and after states
scoring.1: Comparison exists but only shows absolute numbers without percentage or context
scoring.2: Comparison shows both absolute and relative improvement but lacks context on significance
scoring.3: Comparison clearly shows absolute change, percentage improvement, and whether the gain is meaningful

notes: An optimization that makes things worse should score 0 on improvement_measured regardless of methodology quality. If no optimization opportunity exists, documenting that finding with evidence is still a valid pass.
